name: cstk-panel
description: Dashboard de Observabilidade Read-Only para execucoes agente-00c/feature-00c

scripts.build: npm run build -w @cstk-panel/shared-types && npm run build -w @cstk-panel/server && npm run build -w @cstk-panel/web
scripts.lint:readonly-check: grep -rniE '\b(INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE|CREATE|DROP|ALTER)\b' apps/server/src && echo 'FAIL: mutation verbs found' && exit 1 || echo 'OK: no mutation verbs'
